titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of Agricultural Engineering records21-11-2379
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Eileen Keating

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-15 23:50:05 -0500.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Agricultural Engineering records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Agricultural Engineering

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Dept. of Rural Engineering

did.physdesc: Correspondence, legal documents, photographs, printed material.
did.abstract: Correspondence, drawings, legal documents, black and white negatives, prints, films and department history.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Department status came in 1909 with the name Department of Farm Mechanics. In 1913 it was renamed the Department of Rural Engineering and in 1930 the name changed to Department of Agricultural Engineering. This name stayed until 1988 when it was changed to the Department of Agricultural and Biological Engineering and in 2001 it changed to the Department of Biological and Environmental Engineering.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, drawings, legal documents, and other materials relating to patent applications for a cabbage harvester (1964) and an apple harvester (ca. 1970-1983), by Gerald Rehkugler, William F. Millier, Stanley Shepardson, and others. Also black and white negatives and prints (ca. 3x5") of grape harvesters and other experimental farm equipment.
Includes extension reports, plans of work, department reviews (1979, 1985), engineering drawing sheets, and design plans for various equipment.
Also films, photographs, deceased faculty files and other material relating to the department's history.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also Clesson Nathan Turner papers #21-11-810

odd.head: General
odd.p: Publications can be found online here: http://ecommons.cornell.edu/handle/1813/7642

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Agricultural Engineering records, #21-11-2379. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Large spiral-bound manual, "Cooperative State Research Service Review"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries generally includes biographical information, correspondence, photos, publication and presentation lists, promotional materials for tenure, retirement files, annual reviews, sabbatical notes, trip reports, and awards received.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a set of B and W photographs, relating to research.

did.unittitle: Irwin, Lynne H, Lynne H. - Teaching/Advising (1)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes brochures for workshops, newspaper articles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes report of the Technology Transfer Center.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes evaluation report of the Technology Transfer Program.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Final Report of Technology Transfer Center

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes election to Fellowship of World Innovation Foundation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inclusion in list of highly cited researchers, election to AAAS Fellow.

did.unittitle: Stan Shepardson Memorial Statement - R. B. Furry

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs, slides, office name plate, faculty memorial booklet.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes, newspaper clippings, and US Navy photographs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes magazine commemorating CALS Centennial "A Century of Leadership".

did.unittitle: Agriculture and Biological Engineering Department Outreach

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes descriptions of extension activities/programs carried out by faculty and staff.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Biological and Environmental Engineering Department booklet of courses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Booklet, NYS Department of Agriculture and Markets.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 3 booklets: Ag Eng research 1978, Centennial of Hatch Act 1887-1987, Research in Eng and Applied Science, 1984.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes agriculture and Biological Engineering academic review; includes mission, evaluation, recommendations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Alumni News, agricultural progress reports.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a variety of department publications with news, research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a variety of department publications with news, research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Description of program for use of microcomputers in undergraduate curriculum.

did.unittitle: Engineering drawing sheets and schematic drawings
Thermostatically Controlled Exhaust Positioning Louvre, Sheet 2 of 2

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 7 copies of drawing. Design by W. F. Millier 1949, Drawn by A. R. Barton 1950.

did.unittitle: Total and Latent Heat Production of Cattle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Smallest of all the drawings, white paper.

did.unittitle: Thermostatically Controlled Exhaust Positioning Louvre, Sheet 1 of 2
Chart No 11, Psychrometric Chart for Normal Temperatures
Chart No 12, Psychrometric Chart for Low Temperatures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of schematic drawings: "Cornell Multi-Level Fresh Market Apple Harvester"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multiple schematic drawings, laminated, "Designed by Ing Johan Van De Werken".

did.unittitle: Braking of an Agr. Tractor! By K. Ryan, C.W. Terry

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reel is inside a "rush delivery" box, sent from Dept of Ag Eng to WRS Motion Picture Lab.

did.unittitle: Checking the System, Part 1: General Procedure

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Label also says "Film Library, Roberts Hall".

did.unittitle: Agricultural Engineering: Profession With A Future

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: US Dept of Ag, Color, 14 min.

did.unittitle: Checking the Electrical System Part II
Checking and Adjusting the Expansion Valve

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Label reads: "Original silent "A" roll color "Mechanical Harvesting" belonging to Stan Shepherdson.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handwritten post-it note: "Film from Dr. Millier for archives. PS We should show this at a faculty Mtg. I'll make the popcorn!"

did.unittitle: Extra Film From Dorn Farm Operation (1)
Extra Film From Dorn Farm Operation (2)
Film Pieces Cut Out of Apple Harvesting Film

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cut From Before Last Scene of Film. (Close up views).

did.unittitle: Composite Harvester Film and Tomato Harvester
Large Cat. Frame and Trunk Shaker
Leader and Blank Film for Editing

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Black and white photo, approx 16" x 10.75". Reverse description: "Troy Photo. Clara Browning, class of 1912 is the woman on the right without a hat on. She married Professor Goodman." Mounted on cardboard that is partially ripped in upper and lower right corners.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Set of slides, US Dept of Labor.
